---
title: "Contents: _Presentations_"
subtitle: "Talks and posters"
date: today
date-modified: today
listing:
  contents: presentations
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date, date-modified, title, subtitle, reading-time]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Published"
    date-modified: "Edited"  
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: [date, date-modified, title]
  feed:
    title: "Talks and Posters" 
    type: "partial"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
